cases.expect: forks the laravel-security agent and runs an OWASP audit scoped to the given path, returning a confidence-scored report with severity counts and actionable fixes

cases.prompt: audit my Laravel app for security vulnerabilities
cases.expect: forks the laravel-security agent for a full-codebase OWASP audit and reports only findings at confidence >= 80%
forks the laravel-security agent focused on SQL/command injection across the codebase
